title: Villa Anguillitta

address: Cul-de-Sac Road, Blowing Point 2640, Anguilla
name: Daisey Mitchell
reviewContext/Sorotan hotel: Mewah, Pemandangan yang indah, Romantis, Tenang, Cocok untuk anak-anak
text:
A Perfect Week in Paradise at Villa Anguillita

My girlfriend and I just returned from the most incredible weeklong vacation at Villa Anguillita, and we honestly couldn’t have asked for a better experience. From the moment we arrived, it felt like we had found our own little slice of paradise.

The villa itself is absolutely stunning, perfectly situated to offer the most breathtaking views of Saint Martin. There is nothing like waking up in the morning, stepping outside, and taking in that view. It felt like something out of a dream.

We spent our days exploring the island and soaking in all its beauty. Meads Bay and Rendezvous Bay were two of our favorite beaches with crystal clear water, soft sand, and complete relaxation. We were lucky enough to be there for the opening night of Carnival at Carnival Village and got to enjoy the fireworks lighting up the sky. The energy, music, and culture made it an unforgettable night.

One of the things I enjoy most when I travel is meeting the locals, and the people of Anguilla were truly amazing. Everyone we met was kind, welcoming, and full of genuine warmth. Their hospitality made our trip even more special.

A huge thank you to Catherine, our host, who went above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect. She made us feel completely at home and added so many thoughtful touches to our stay. The villa is fully equipped with everything you could possibly need and more.

We are already planning our next trip back and will absolutely be staying at Villa Anguillita again. If you are looking for a place to stay that offers comfort, character, and the true spirit of Anguilla, this is the spot.

Highly recommended!!
textTranslated:
Seminggu yang Sempurna di Surga di Villa Anguillita

Saya dan pacar saya baru saja kembali dari liburan seminggu yang luar biasa di Villa Anguillita, dan jujur ​​saja, kami tidak bisa meminta pengalaman yang lebih baik. Sejak saat kami tiba, rasanya seperti kami telah menemukan sepotong kecil surga kami sendiri.

Villa itu sendiri benar-benar menakjubkan, terletak sempurna untuk menawarkan pemandangan Saint Martin yang paling menakjubkan. Tidak ada yang seperti bangun di pagi hari, melangkah keluar, dan menikmati pemandangan itu. Rasanya seperti sesuatu yang keluar dari mimpi.

Kami menghabiskan hari-hari kami menjelajahi pulau dan menikmati semua keindahannya. Meads Bay dan Rendezvous Bay adalah dua pantai favorit kami dengan air sebening kristal, pasir lembut, dan relaksasi total. Kami cukup beruntung berada di sana untuk malam pembukaan Karnaval di Carnival Village dan dapat menikmati kembang api yang menerangi langit. Energi, musik, dan budayanya menjadikannya malam yang tak terlupakan.

Salah satu hal yang paling saya nikmati saat bepergian adalah bertemu penduduk setempat, dan orang-orang Anguilla benar-benar luar biasa. Semua orang yang kami temui ramah, hangat, dan penuh dengan kehangatan yang tulus. Keramahtamahan mereka membuat perjalanan kami semakin istimewa.

Terima kasih banyak kepada Catherine, tuan rumah kami, yang telah melakukan yang terbaik untuk memastikan semuanya sempurna. Dia membuat kami merasa benar-benar seperti di rumah dan menambahkan begitu banyak sentuhan perhatian pada masa inap kami. Vila ini dilengkapi sepenuhnya dengan semua yang Anda butuhkan dan lebih dari itu.

Kami sudah merencanakan perjalanan kami berikutnya dan pasti akan menginap di Villa Anguillita lagi. Jika Anda mencari tempat menginap yang menawarkan kenyamanan, karakter, dan semangat sejati Anguilla, inilah tempatnya.

Sangat direkomendasikan!!
title: Villa Anguillitta

address: Cul-de-Sac Road, Blowing Point 2640, Anguilla
name: Carla Pecke
text:
Unforgettable Stay at Villa Anguillita

Spending a week at Villa Anguillita with my girlfriend was hands down one of the best vacations we’ve ever had. The location is unbeatable. Every morning we woke up to the most incredible view of Saint Martin right from our villa. It honestly felt like something off a postcard.

We took full advantage of our time on the island, exploring beach after beach. Meads Bay and Rendezvous Bay were absolutely stunning, with their calm turquoise waters and soft white sand. We even made it to Carnival Village for the opening night of Carnival, which was an experience in itself. The music, the fireworks, the celebration—it was all amazing.

What really made the trip special was the people. Everyone we met was so friendly and genuine. I love connecting with locals when I travel, and the people in Anguilla were some of the kindest I’ve met anywhere.

Catherine, our host at the villa, made sure everything was perfect from the start. She was so helpful and welcoming, and really made us feel at home. The villa had everything we needed and more. It was private, peaceful, and full of charm.

If you’re looking for a place that gives you space, comfort, and views you’ll never forget, skip the hotel and stay here. I’m already planning our return trip and wouldn’t think of staying anywhere else.

Pengalaman Tak Terlupakan di Villa Anguillita

Menghabiskan seminggu di Villa Anguillita bersama pacar saya adalah salah satu liburan terbaik yang pernah kami alami. Lokasinya tak tertandingi. Setiap pagi kami bangun dengan pemandangan Saint Martin yang luar biasa tepat dari villa kami. Rasanya seperti berada di kartu pos.

Kami memanfaatkan waktu kami di pulau itu sepenuhnya, menjelajahi pantai demi pantai. Meads Bay dan Rendezvous Bay benar-benar menakjubkan, dengan airnya yang tenang berwarna biru kehijauan dan pasir putih yang lembut. Kami bahkan sempat mengunjungi Carnival Village untuk malam pembukaan Karnaval, yang merupakan pengalaman tersendiri. Musiknya, kembang apinya, perayaannya—semuanya luar biasa.

Yang benar-benar membuat perjalanan ini istimewa adalah orang-orangnya. Semua orang yang kami temui sangat ramah dan tulus. Saya suka berinteraksi dengan penduduk lokal saat bepergian, dan orang-orang di Anguilla adalah beberapa orang paling baik yang pernah saya temui di mana pun.

text: We traveled to Anguilla via St Maarten to attend the World Doctors Orchestra.   We had a very bad flight experience (3 days stuck in the Miami Airport due to delay after delay after delay). Mori assisted us further by grocery shopping for us- a standard perk for Villa Anguillitta!  The Dolphin Suite was absolutely wonderful!  The Grouper  Suite was wonderful too, but Sharon offered an upgrade because of our horrible experience getting there.  That is called EXCELLENT customer service. title: Villa Anguillitta

address: Cul-de-Sac Road, Blowing Point 2640, Anguilla
name: Denny Swenson
text:
The devotion to detail in lay out, design and materials creates a luxurious space at Villa Anguillitta.

This is a beautiful property in a gorgeous location. Sharon, the owner, could not have been nicer or more hospitable. She was super friendly as we were setting up our stay. She stayed in a room just below the main part of the property, always offering guidance or assistance with any question we came up with.

Upon arrival we got the grand tour and we couldn’t believe the grandeur. She walked us throughout as she explained how everything works and the thinking behind each detail.

There is a beautiful dining room and living room area comfortable for large family or group.

The lovely, modern kitchen is fully equipped with a coffee maker, blender, waffle maker etc. There is a Keurig out back on the patio by the pool and amazing ocean view with St Martin.

The property is spacious allowing a family to spread out. The bedside has plenty of space for your book, phone, ear pods, chargers etc.

You can’t help but feel pampered in the large, modern, open bathrooms complete with nice feeling and smelling soap, shampoo, conditioner and hand lotion.

Every bedroom is beautiful and comfortable with its’ own personality tied into the larger whole of the grand home.

The outdoor area is complete with plenty of comfortable floats on the infinity pool. Snorkeling gear is available if you want to bring with you to the beach. There are so many amazing beaches nearby, but we never felt bad about leaving them because we couldn’t wait to get back to our vacation villa pool and view.

Here is where detail comes in, the patio tile was soft on the feet and did not get too hot to walk on. There are plenty of comfortable chez lounges and seating areas in the sun and shade with end tables to rest your book, sunglasses or beverages. Put down your phone and enjoy the view!! The landscape design is very thoughtful from the coconut trees, hedge type plants around the edges and fencing, the bougenvillea, assorted flowers, and the stone work throughout!

The kids had fun playing the organ at night. We all took a stab at the cat jigsaw puzzle. With our few nights left we have every intention of playing darts, another round of mini golf and enjoying the sauna and jacuzzi.

Another pleasant surprise was the workout room. The padded floor in the workout room was good for pilates. I did my hand weights each day and pulled out the yoga mat by the pool for stretches. We didn’t get around to using the major equipment but we each tried the jiggle
machine for kicks. My husband and kids went for a run in the neighborhood and loved meeting all the friendly dogs and goats nearby. Very welcoming, elegant and charming place for a family or group to stay at.
textTranslated:
Dedikasi terhadap detail dalam tata letak, desain, dan material menciptakan ruang mewah di Villa Anguillitta.

Ini adalah properti yang indah di lokasi yang menawan. Sharon, pemiliknya, sangat ramah dan baik hati. Ia sangat ramah saat kami mempersiapkan diri untuk menginap. Ia menginap di kamar tepat di bawah bagian utama properti, selalu menawarkan panduan atau bantuan untuk setiap pertanyaan yang kami ajukan.

Setibanya di sana, kami mendapatkan tur besar dan kami takjub dengan kemegahannya. Ia memandu kami berkeliling sambil menjelaskan cara kerja semuanya dan pemikiran di balik setiap detail.

Terdapat ruang makan dan ruang tamu yang indah, nyaman untuk keluarga besar atau rombongan.

Dapur modern yang indah dilengkapi dengan pembuat kopi, blender, pembuat wafel, dll. Terdapat juga mesin pembuat kopi Keurig di teras belakang di tepi kolam renang dan pemandangan laut yang menakjubkan dengan St Martin.

Properti ini luas sehingga memungkinkan keluarga untuk bersantai. Bagian samping tempat tidur memiliki banyak ruang untuk buku, ponsel, earpod, pengisi daya, dll.

Anda pasti akan merasa dimanjakan di kamar mandi terbuka yang luas, modern, dan nyaman, lengkap dengan sabun, sampo, kondisioner, dan losion tangan yang nyaman dan beraroma harum.

Setiap kamar tidur indah dan nyaman dengan kepribadiannya sendiri yang menyatu dengan keseluruhan rumah megah ini.

Area luar ruangan dilengkapi dengan banyak pelampung nyaman di kolam renang infinity. Peralatan snorkeling tersedia jika Anda ingin membawanya ke pantai. Ada begitu banyak pantai menakjubkan di dekatnya, tetapi kami tidak pernah merasa menyesal meninggalkannya karena kami tidak sabar untuk kembali ke kolam renang dan pemandangan vila liburan kami.

Di sinilah detailnya terlihat, ubin terasnya empuk di kaki dan tidak terlalu panas untuk diinjak. Ada banyak lounge dan area duduk nyaman di bawah sinar matahari dan teduh dengan meja di ujung untuk meletakkan buku, kacamata hitam, atau minuman Anda. Letakkan ponsel Anda dan nikmati pemandangannya!! Desain lanskapnya sangat cermat, mulai dari pohon kelapa, tanaman pagar di tepi dan pagar, bougenville, aneka bunga, hingga hiasan batu di seluruh ruangan!

Anak-anak senang bermain organ di malam hari. Kami semua mencoba bermain puzzle kucing. Dengan sisa malam yang sedikit, kami berniat bermain dart, bermain golf mini lagi, dan menikmati sauna serta jacuzzi.

Kejutan menyenangkan lainnya adalah ruang olahraga. Lantai empuk di ruang olahraga cocok untuk pilates. Saya berlatih angkat beban setiap hari dan menggunakan matras yoga di tepi kolam renang untuk peregangan. Kami tidak sempat menggunakan peralatan utama, tetapi kami masing-masing mencoba jiggle machine untuk iseng. Suami dan anak-anak saya berlari-lari di sekitar lingkungan dan senang bertemu dengan anjing dan kambing yang ramah di sekitar. Tempat yang sangat ramah, elegan, dan menawan untuk menginap bersama keluarga atau rombongan.
title: Villa Anguillitta

name: 254dennys
text: The devotion to detail in lay out, design and materials creates a luxurious space at Villa Anguillitta.||This is a beautiful property in a gorgeous location. Sharon, the owner, could not have been nicer or more hospitable. She was super friendly as we were setting up our stay. She stayed in a room just below the main part of the property, always offering guidance or assistance with any question we came up with.||Upon arrival we got the grand tour and we couldn’t believe the grandeur. She walked us throughout as she explained how everything works and the thinking behind each detail.||There is a beautiful dining room and living room area comfortable for large family or group.||The lovely, modern kitchen is fully equipped with a coffee maker, blender, waffle maker etc. There is a Keurig out back on the patio by the pool and amazing ocean view with St Martin.||The property is spacious allowing a family to spread out. The bedside has plenty of space for your book, phone, ear pods, chargers etc.||You can’t help but feel pampered in the large, modern, open bathrooms complete with nice feeling and smelling soap, shampoo, conditioner and hand lotion.||Every bedroom is beautiful and comfortable with its’ own personality tied into the larger whole of the grand home.||The outdoor area is complete with plenty of comfortable floats on the infinity pool. Snorkeling gear is available if you want to bring with you to the beach. There are so many amazing beaches nearby, but we never felt bad about leaving them because we couldn’t wait to get back to our vacation villa pool and view.||Here is where detail comes in, the patio tile was soft on the feet and did not get too hot to walk on. There are plenty of comfortable chez lounges and seating areas in the sun and shade with end tables to rest your book, sunglasses or beverages. Put down your phone and enjoy the view!! The landscape design is very thoughtful from the coconut trees, hedge type plants around the edges and fencing, the bougenvillea, assorted flowers, and the stone work throughout!||The kids had fun playing the organ at night. We all took a stab at the cat jigsaw puzzle. With our few nights left we have every intention of playing darts, another round of mini golf and enjoying the sauna and jacuzzi.||Another pleasant surprise was the workout room. The padded floor in the workout room was good for pilates. I did my hand weights each day and pulled out the yoga mat by the pool for stretches. We didn’t get around to using the major equipment but we each tried the jiggle||machine for kicks. My husband and kids went for a run in the neighborhood and loved meeting all the friendly dogs and goats nearby. Very welcoming, elegant and charming place for a family or group to stay at.

address: 4A Cruz Bay Quarter, St John 00831, Kepulauan Virgin Amerika Serikat
name: bob bowser
text:
The location is superb, right in the middle of Cruz Bay. The room we were in had a magnificent view of the bay, genuinely nice. The bed and climate controls all were great.

The room was large, but a bit sparse, especially on the balcony which seemed huge but just had two chairs, a plant, and a small table. Fine but a bit odd. It just seemed they put the basics in every room even when they had space to do more.

The TV set-up is oddly confusing with a couple of remotes and required a special card to decode. This could easily be fixed.

The only real downside was that the daily maid service was basic. They would make the bed, empty trash containers, and change towels but no real cleaning. By the end of six days the balcony was covered in sand, the floor was dirty, and most of the surfaces in the room were a bit grimy. Not sure why at these prices but it was more of minimal thing.
All in all, a nice stay.
textTranslated:
Lokasinya luar biasa, tepat di tengah Cruz Bay. Kamar yang kami tempati memiliki pemandangan teluk yang menakjubkan, sungguh indah. Kasur dan AC semuanya bagus.

Kamarnya luas, tetapi agak minim, terutama di balkon yang tampak besar tetapi hanya memiliki dua kursi, tanaman, dan meja kecil. Lumayan, tetapi agak aneh. Sepertinya mereka hanya menyediakan fasilitas dasar di setiap kamar meskipun mereka memiliki ruang untuk menyediakan lebih banyak.

Pengaturan TV agak membingungkan dengan beberapa remote dan membutuhkan kartu khusus untuk mendekode. Ini bisa dengan mudah diperbaiki.

Satu-satunya kekurangan adalah layanan kebersihan harian yang sangat mendasar. Mereka merapikan tempat tidur, mengosongkan tempat sampah, dan mengganti handuk, tetapi tidak ada pembersihan menyeluruh. Pada akhir enam hari, balkon dipenuhi pasir, lantai kotor, dan sebagian besar permukaan di kamar agak kotor. Tidak yakin mengapa dengan harga seperti ini, tetapi itu lebih merupakan hal yang minimal.
Secara keseluruhan, pengalaman menginap yang menyenangkan.
title: Wharfside Village Hotel

address: 4A Cruz Bay Quarter, St John 00831, Kepulauan Virgin Amerika Serikat
name: Bruce Miller
text: Absolute 5+ star hotel.  Just came back from a 4 night stay.  Loved the rooms, very clean and well decorated.  We stayed in a beach view King room.  Loved the view from the patio.  The service was top notch from everyone we interacted with.  I think the location is the best on the island.  Close to the main pier which puts you at the main taxi area for grabbing rides to the various beaches.  Close and safe walking distance to all restaurant bars we wanted to visit, except for the Windmill.  Loved the "Beach Bar"  on the property.  We happened to catch a live band there and they were great.  Even though we were very close to the Karma and Beach Bar restaurant/bars, we did not hear a thing from our room.  Can't say enough good things about the property.  Would definitely visit again.
textTranslated: Hotel bintang 5+ yang luar biasa. Baru saja kembali dari menginap 4 malam. Sangat menyukai kamar-kamarnya, sangat bersih dan didekorasi dengan baik. Kami menginap di kamar King dengan pemandangan pantai. Sangat menyukai pemandangan dari teras. Pelayanan dari semua orang yang berinteraksi dengan kami sangat prima. Saya rasa lokasinya adalah yang terbaik di pulau ini. Dekat dengan dermaga utama yang menempatkan Anda di area taksi utama untuk naik taksi ke berbagai pantai. Dekat dan aman untuk berjalan kaki ke semua restoran dan bar yang ingin kami kunjungi, kecuali Windmill. Sangat menyukai "Beach Bar" di properti ini. Kami kebetulan menonton band live di sana dan mereka hebat. Meskipun kami sangat dekat dengan restoran/bar Karma dan Beach Bar, kami tidak mendengar apa pun dari kamar kami. Tidak ada kata-kata yang cukup untuk memuji properti ini. Pasti akan berkunjung lagi.
title: Wharfside Village Hotel

address: 4A Cruz Bay Quarter, St John 00831, Kepulauan Virgin Amerika Serikat
name: Eliz L.
text: I cannot recommend the Wharfside Village Hotel highly enough. Aside from the most beautiful room, the perfect location, and the stunning view, the customer service was the best I've ever experienced in my world travels. The people here are truly exceptional and are the reason I would go back a million times over. A big thank you to Dawn, Adam, and Lindsay for making our stay so special.
textTranslated: Saya sangat merekomendasikan Wharfside Village Hotel. Selain kamar yang sangat indah, lokasi yang sempurna, dan pemandangan yang menakjubkan, layanan pelanggannya adalah yang terbaik yang pernah saya alami selama perjalanan saya keliling dunia. Orang-orang di sini benar-benar luar biasa dan merupakan alasan mengapa saya akan kembali berkali-kali. Terima kasih banyak kepada Dawn, Adam, dan Lindsay karena telah membuat kunjungan kami begitu istimewa.
title: Wharfside Village Hotel

address: 4A Cruz Bay Quarter, St John 00831, Kepulauan Virgin Amerika Serikat
name: Julie Pinkosh
text: Beautiful hotel, centrally located in the heart of Cruz Bay. My husband and I booked a Queen beachfront room. It was a VERY small space with no furniture.  There was no where to unpack and put your belongings. We made the best of it but I would suggest at least some end tables with some drawers instead of two small wooden squares. Our friend booked the King beachfront suite and that room was gorgeous. *Beware of the micro size Queen room. If you’re just 1 person it could be ok but was very tight for two people.
textTranslated: Hotel yang indah, berlokasi strategis di jantung Cruz Bay. Saya dan suami memesan kamar Queen menghadap pantai. Ruangannya SANGAT kecil tanpa perabot. Tidak ada tempat untuk membongkar dan meletakkan barang-barang kami. Kami berusaha sebaik mungkin, tetapi saya sarankan setidaknya beberapa meja kecil dengan laci, bukan hanya dua kotak kayu kecil. Teman kami memesan suite King menghadap pantai dan kamar itu sangat cantik. *Hati-hati dengan kamar Queen berukuran mikro. Jika hanya untuk 1 orang mungkin tidak masalah, tetapi sangat sempit untuk dua orang.
title: Wharfside Village Hotel

address: 4A Cruz Bay Quarter, St John 00831, Kepulauan Virgin Amerika Serikat
name: Maryann B.
text: This is a nice hotel with a great balcony... but the rooms have NO furniture except .. a bed.  The nightstands are two small blocks of wood..no drawers or space.  So .. you live out of your suitcase and it gets old fast.  We stayed four nights.. I'd say two nights too long in a place like this. It is right by Cruz bay and in the middle of fun..so that's good.  I'd come back for night or two and that's it.
textTranslated: Ini hotel yang bagus dengan balkon yang indah... tetapi kamar-kamarnya TIDAK memiliki perabot kecuali... tempat tidur. Meja samping tempat tidurnya hanya dua balok kayu kecil... tanpa laci atau ruang penyimpanan. Jadi... Anda harus membawa barang-barang dari koper dan itu akan cepat membosankan. Kami menginap empat malam... menurut saya dua malam terlalu lama di tempat seperti ini. Letaknya tepat di dekat Cruz Bay dan di tengah keramaian... jadi itu bagus. Saya akan kembali untuk satu atau dua malam saja, itu saja.

text: We have been to Gallows Point two times now - once for our honeymoon in 2022 and once May 2026 MDW. We love this place. The service is incredible. So friendly, and very local. Everyone knows you, and everyone is very sweet and attentive. We especially love the location for a few reasons: walking distance to Cruz Bay, but feels detached from it and very peaceful; the swimming and snorkeling right off the resort is incredible; free parking; and the grounds are simply stunning with lovely views everywhere you look. Literally everywhere!!! We stayed in oceanview lower unit 2B, and we loved it. It was quiet, beautiful, and comfortable. We made breakfast every morning while watching hummingbirds, listening to the ocean, and even getting a glimpse of a peacock strolling by. The shower was lovely and the bed was very comfortable. If we ever needed anything, the staff was quick to help out. One great addition from last time is great Wifi and streaming - amazing!! The AC worked so well, which is rare on island. I truly don’t understand the issues people have with this place. Yes, it’s a rustic experience in comparison to a big box hotel chain, but this is St. John! The whole point is to have Caribbean charm and quaint, rustic vibes. If you’re looking for modern beach experience, like a luxury all inclusive or whatever, go to a different island. St. John is special because it’s unique, nature centered, and organically beautiful without a bunch of cheesy bells and whistles. I think Gallows Point resort captures the beauty of St. John beyond perfectly, and it offers a high end, boutique yet rustic stay filled with Caribbean charm and warmth. We had everything we needed and more, it was impeccably clean, and I would absolutely stay at Gallows again and again. Can’t wait to come back next year. Love to all and great job to all staff!!!!
textTranslated: Kami sudah dua kali ke Gallows Point - sekali untuk bulan madu kami pada tahun 2022 dan sekali lagi pada liburan akhir pekan Mei 2026. Kami sangat menyukai tempat ini. Pelayanannya luar biasa. Sangat ramah, dan sangat lokal. Semua orang mengenal Anda, dan semua orang sangat ramah dan perhatian. Kami terutama menyukai lokasinya karena beberapa alasan: jaraknya dekat dengan Cruz Bay, tetapi terasa terpisah dan sangat damai; berenang dan snorkeling tepat di depan resor sangat luar biasa; parkir gratis; dan areanya sangat menakjubkan dengan pemandangan indah di mana pun Anda memandang. Benar-benar di mana-mana!!! Kami menginap di unit bawah 2B dengan pemandangan laut, dan kami menyukainya. Tempatnya tenang, indah, dan nyaman. Kami membuat sarapan setiap pagi sambil mengamati burung kolibri, mendengarkan deburan ombak, dan bahkan melihat sekilas burung merak yang lewat. Kamar mandinya bagus dan tempat tidurnya sangat nyaman. Jika kami membutuhkan sesuatu, staf dengan cepat membantu. Satu tambahan yang bagus dari kunjungan terakhir adalah Wifi dan streaming yang hebat - luar biasa!! AC berfungsi dengan sangat baik, yang jarang ditemukan di pulau ini. Saya benar-benar tidak mengerti masalah yang dialami orang-orang dengan tempat ini. Ya, ini memang pengalaman yang sederhana dibandingkan dengan jaringan hotel besar, tetapi ini St. John! Intinya adalah memiliki pesona Karibia dan suasana pedesaan yang unik. Jika Anda mencari pengalaman pantai modern, seperti paket all-inclusive mewah atau semacamnya, pergilah ke pulau lain. St. John istimewa karena unik, berpusat pada alam, dan indah secara alami tanpa banyak embel-embel yang murahan. Saya pikir resor Gallows Point menangkap keindahan St. John dengan sempurna, dan menawarkan penginapan butik kelas atas namun tetap sederhana yang dipenuhi pesona dan kehangatan Karibia. Kami memiliki semua yang kami butuhkan dan lebih dari itu, tempatnya sangat bersih, dan saya pasti akan menginap di Gallows lagi dan lagi. Tidak sabar untuk kembali tahun depan. Salam hangat untuk semua dan kerja bagus untuk semua staf!!!!
title: Gallows Point Resort

text:
We had an absolutely unforgettable stay at this resort! From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel genuinely welcome—they were not only friendly but incredibly knowledgeable and always ready to help with anything we needed.

The views were simply breathtaking, and the location couldn’t have been more perfect—close to everything, yet peaceful and relaxing. The entire property was spotless, and the amenities were clearly very well maintained, which made our stay even more comfortable. The free parking was a huge bonus and made everything so convenient.

What truly made our stay extra special was the thoughtful gesture from the staff—they surprised us with a complimentary bottle of champagne after learning we were on our honeymoon. That level of care and attention to detail meant so much to us.
We can’t recommend this place enough and will definitely be coming back!

text:
This was our first visit to St. John, and my wife and I stayed at Gallows Point. While the location is convenient, our overall experience was disappointing—especially given the ~$1,100/night price point—and we would not recommend staying here.

We booked an upstairs unit, but the harbor view was underwhelming and did not justify the cost. More concerning was the condition and maintenance of the room, which fell well below expectations for a property at this tier (see photos).

Several issues stood out:

- The balcony door was visibly rotted, with a broken door sweep left on the balcony and multiple 2" screws protruding from it.

- The toilet paper holder was not properly secured, causing it to fall off during normal use.

- Multiple light switches were installed upside down—so even the “Lutron” branding is inverted—which gives the space a careless, unfinished feel despite the use of modern screwless plates.

There are also broader signs of deferred maintenance. The structural framing is visually appealing, but the exposed gusset plates are heavily rusted. While I understand the challenges of a coastal environment, these are typically treated or painted in comparable properties, and the difference in finish quality is noticeable.

Overall, the property feels like it has good underlying design but lacks the attention to detail and upkeep expected at this price level.
textTranslated:
Ini adalah kunjungan pertama kami ke St. John, dan saya dan istri menginap di Gallows Point. Meskipun lokasinya nyaman, pengalaman kami secara keseluruhan mengecewakan—terutama mengingat harga sekitar $1.100 per malam—dan kami tidak akan merekomendasikan untuk menginap di sini.

Kami memesan unit di lantai atas, tetapi pemandangan pelabuhannya kurang memuaskan dan tidak sepadan dengan harganya. Yang lebih mengkhawatirkan adalah kondisi dan pemeliharaan kamar, yang jauh di bawah ekspektasi untuk properti di kelas ini (lihat foto).

Beberapa masalah menonjol:

- Pintu balkon terlihat lapuk, dengan penutup celah pintu yang rusak tertinggal di balkon dan beberapa sekrup 2 inci menonjol keluar.

- Tempat tisu toilet tidak terpasang dengan benar, sehingga mudah jatuh saat digunakan.

- Beberapa sakelar lampu dipasang terbalik—bahkan merek "Lutron" pun terbalik—yang memberikan kesan ceroboh dan belum selesai meskipun menggunakan pelat tanpa sekrup modern.

Terdapat juga tanda-tanda perawatan yang tertunda. Rangka strukturalnya terlihat menarik secara visual, tetapi pelat penguat yang terbuka berkarat parah. Meskipun saya memahami tantangan lingkungan pesisir, bagian ini biasanya dirawat atau dicat pada properti sejenis, dan perbedaan kualitas finishingnya terlihat jelas.

Secara keseluruhan, properti ini terasa memiliki desain dasar yang baik tetapi kurang memperhatikan detail dan perawatan yang diharapkan pada tingkat harga ini.

name: Ben Manley
reviewContext/Kamar: HORRIBLE Ocean View Lower Suite. Torture Chamber
street: 3 AAA Gallows Point Road St. John
text:
Unfortunately I have to leave the following honest review of Gallows Point.  We booked Gallows point resort for 5 Days in August.  We were excited to stay here after reading a lot of the other reviews.  Upon checking in at 3 pm (check in time) we were told that our room was not ready yet due to som issues with the bathroom.  We waited for an hour in the lobby in the sweltering heat until we were moved to a different room because the issue was still going on.

Upon checking into the new room (4B) the smell of chemicals and cleaner was so strong we had to open all windows and leave the room for 3 hours while it aired out.  The smell made both my wife and I ill.  We waited by the pool for 2 hours, then went back to the room to try to get ready for our 630 dinner reservation at 1864 (which was absolutely amazing!) When we arrived back to the room it still smelled so we had to then shower and get ready in a room where the temperature was now over 90 degrees due to us having to have the windows open to air it out.

The rooms are ok, the furniture def needs an upgrade in the living room but that wasn’t an issue, we could live with that.  I will say the ONE positive thing was that when we got back from dinner and were able to shut the windows and turn on the AC, the AC was the best AC we experienced on our 14 day trip.

Here’s where the nightmare really begins.  We arrive home from dinner and rinse off and get ready to go to bed.  Upon laying down on the mattress, we both knew were were in for a long night.  The mattress was the worst mattress I’ve ever slept on and has to be at least 20 years old. It was awful.  There was also an extremely bright light outside (resort light) that we had no way to block out or turn off.  (Imagine trying to sleep in a tanning bed with the lights on and on your Grandmothers mattress). So my wife tossed and turned for a couple hours.  You would think it couldn’t get any worse right?  WRONG!  Around 2am a loud beeping noise starts outside of our room and continues until 7am where we found out that this was due to something wrong with the sewer. This was the absolute worst night of sleep I have ever attempted, worse then sleeping on the floor of an airport overnight, worse then camping in sub zero weather, pure torture.

At 7am we exit our room to see the workers. They apologized for the intrusion and began working on the sewer equipment to clear some sort of clog that the alarm was notifying them off.  I carried all our our luggage to the front desk, explained that we would be checking out and moving to a new hotel due to the torturous night we experienced here.    The lady at the front desk was very apologetic and nice and we were on our way.

One week later I checked the hotel bill and noticed we did not receive any type of refund for the remaining nights that we did not stay there.  I contacted the front office thinking this must be some kind of oversight.  I figured it would be worked out easily and we could move on.  WRONG.  Apparently it states “ No refunds for early departures will be issued.” listed in the cancelation policy.  So I’m being charged $2000,00 because I refused to endure 4 more continued nights of torture at their resort.   This place is an absolute scam, DO NOT STAY here.

In the end, even if they would have told me upon checking out that I wasn’t going to get my money back, I still would have left and made the same decision I did because no one should have to endure the type of torture you will endure if you choose to try to get some rest at this resort.  I’ll be contacting my credit card company and reporting this scam.  What a wonderful way to spend our anniversary.

Do check out the wharfside village.  It’s a lovely hotel
textTranslated:
Sayangnya saya harus memberikan ulasan jujur ​​berikut tentang Gallows Point. Kami memesan resor Gallows Point selama 5 hari di bulan Agustus. Kami sangat antusias untuk menginap di sini setelah membaca banyak ulasan lain. Saat check-in pukul 3 sore (waktu check-in), kami diberitahu bahwa kamar kami belum siap karena ada masalah dengan kamar mandi. Kami menunggu selama satu jam di lobi dalam cuaca yang sangat panas sampai kami dipindahkan ke kamar lain karena masalahnya masih berlanjut.

Setelah masuk ke kamar baru (4B), bau bahan kimia dan pembersih sangat menyengat sehingga kami harus membuka semua jendela dan meninggalkan kamar selama 3 jam agar udaranya hilang. Bau tersebut membuat saya dan istri saya sakit. Kami menunggu di tepi kolam renang selama 2 jam, lalu kembali ke kamar untuk bersiap-siap untuk reservasi makan malam pukul 6.30 di 1864 (yang benar-benar luar biasa!). Ketika kami kembali ke kamar, baunya masih tercium sehingga kami harus mandi dan bersiap-siap di kamar yang suhunya sekarang lebih dari 90 derajat karena kami harus membuka jendela untuk mengangin-anginkan ruangan.

Kamarnya lumayan, perabotannya memang perlu diperbarui di ruang tamu, tetapi itu bukan masalah, kami bisa menerimanya. Satu hal positifnya adalah ketika kami kembali dari makan malam dan bisa menutup jendela serta menyalakan AC, AC-nya adalah AC terbaik yang kami alami selama perjalanan 14 hari kami.

Di sinilah mimpi buruk sebenarnya dimulai. Kami tiba di rumah setelah makan malam, membilas diri, dan bersiap untuk tidur. Setelah berbaring di kasur, kami berdua tahu bahwa kami akan mengalami malam yang panjang. Kasurnya adalah kasur terburuk yang pernah saya tiduri dan setidaknya sudah berusia 20 tahun. Sangat mengerikan. Ada juga lampu yang sangat terang di luar (lampu resor) yang tidak bisa kami halangi atau matikan. (Bayangkan mencoba tidur di tempat berjemur dengan lampu menyala dan di atas kasur nenek Anda). Jadi istri saya gelisah dan bolak-balik selama beberapa jam. Anda mungkin berpikir tidak mungkin lebih buruk lagi, kan? SALAH! Sekitar pukul 2 pagi, suara berbunyi keras mulai terdengar di luar kamar kami dan berlanjut hingga pukul 7 pagi, di mana kami mengetahui bahwa itu disebabkan oleh sesuatu yang salah dengan saluran pembuangan. Ini adalah malam tidur terburuk yang pernah saya alami, lebih buruk daripada tidur di lantai bandara semalaman, lebih buruk daripada berkemah di suhu di bawah nol, benar-benar siksaan.

Pukul 7 pagi kami keluar dari kamar dan melihat para pekerja. Mereka meminta maaf atas gangguan tersebut dan mulai memperbaiki peralatan saluran pembuangan untuk membersihkan semacam penyumbatan yang diberitahukan oleh alarm. Saya membawa semua barang bawaan kami ke meja resepsionis, menjelaskan bahwa kami akan check out dan pindah ke hotel baru karena malam yang menyiksa yang kami alami di sini. Wanita di meja resepsionis sangat meminta maaf dan ramah, dan kami pun segera pergi.

Seminggu kemudian saya memeriksa tagihan hotel dan menyadari bahwa kami tidak menerima pengembalian dana untuk malam-malam yang tersisa yang tidak kami tempati. Saya menghubungi kantor depan karena mengira ini pasti kesalahan. Saya pikir masalah ini akan diselesaikan dengan mudah dan kami bisa melanjutkan. SALAH. Ternyata, kebijakan pembatalan menyatakan "Tidak ada pengembalian dana untuk keberangkatan lebih awal." Jadi saya dikenakan biaya $2000,00 karena saya menolak untuk menanggung siksaan selama 4 malam lagi di resor mereka. Tempat ini benar-benar penipuan, JANGAN MENGINAP di sini.

Pada akhirnya, bahkan jika mereka memberi tahu saya saat check-out bahwa saya tidak akan mendapatkan uang saya kembali, saya tetap akan pergi dan membuat keputusan yang sama karena tidak seorang pun harus menanggung siksaan seperti yang akan Anda alami jika Anda memilih untuk beristirahat di resor ini. Saya akan menghubungi perusahaan kartu kredit saya dan melaporkan penipuan ini. Sungguh cara yang luar biasa untuk merayakan ulang tahun pernikahan kami.

Jangan lupa untuk mengunjungi desa di tepi dermaga. Hotelnya sangat bagus.

text: We loved staying at CeBlue! The rooms are beautiful, resort style rooms with beautiful bathrooms perfect our our large family. The deck and large umbrellas became our gathering place to see the amazing views everyday. The kitchen and dining suited us perfectly too. We loved the location with the beautiful beach, calm waters and restaurants right there. The gym was great as well! We highly recommend!
textTranslated: Kami sangat senang menginap di CeBlue! Kamarnya indah, bergaya resor dengan kamar mandi yang cantik, sangat cocok untuk keluarga besar kami. Teras dan payung-payung besar menjadi tempat berkumpul kami untuk menikmati pemandangan menakjubkan setiap hari. Dapur dan ruang makannya juga sangat sesuai dengan kebutuhan kami. Kami menyukai lokasinya dengan pantai yang indah, perairan yang tenang, dan restoran-restoran yang berada tepat di dekatnya. Gym-nya juga bagus! Kami sangat merekomendasikan tempat ini!

text: We absolutely loved our stay at Ce Bleu villas! The villa was perfect to share with another couple, but we all discussed how equally perfect it would be if we had brought our grown children. The bedrooms were huge and comfortable and very private. The kitchen was wonderful, but the best part was the common area between them with the private pool and the beautiful sitting area overlooking the water. The staff were all so friendly and could not offer us enough to make our stay perfect. It was wonderful to be able to walk down to the beach and enjoy Da Vidas for lunch and dinner. We definitely plan to go back again!
textTranslated: Kami sangat menyukai masa menginap kami di vila Ce Bleu! Vila ini sangat cocok untuk berbagi dengan pasangan lain, tetapi kami semua berdiskusi betapa sempurnanya jika kami membawa anak-anak kami yang sudah dewasa. Kamar tidurnya luas, nyaman, dan sangat pribadi. Dapurnya luar biasa, tetapi bagian terbaiknya adalah area bersama di antara keduanya dengan kolam renang pribadi dan area tempat duduk yang indah menghadap ke laut. Semua staf sangat ramah dan selalu siap membantu kami untuk membuat masa menginap kami sempurna. Sungguh menyenangkan bisa berjalan kaki ke pantai dan menikmati Da Vidas untuk makan siang dan makan malam. Kami pasti berencana untuk kembali lagi!

text:
I had the most amazing birthday stay at Ce’Blue Villas! From start to finish, everything exceeded my expectations. The property itself was beautiful, peaceful, and the perfect place to celebrate.

A special shoutout to Shevonne she was absolutely incredible! Her communication was on point the entire time, and she truly delivered top-tier customer service.

name: lildorth
text: We had 4 couples that stayed at CeBlue Villas April 10-17, 2026.  The Villas are amazing! we each had our own private room with a shared large deck with a gorgeous view and plenty of shade and our own swimming pool. We had the common kitchen area with a dining table that had everything you would need. The staff is amazing and everyone is so helpful.|We opted to have the continental breakfast delivered every morning, which consisted of fresh fruit, orange juice, and either croissants or bagels. This was a perfect way to start the day.  Shavonne set up transportation for us on the nights we went out to dinner so we didn’t have to drive. We did do the welcome barbecue on our first night, which was absolutely delicious. CeBlue is conveniently located on the island and was only a 15 minute drive to Shoal Bay East in one direction or a 15 minute drive to Meads  Bay in another direction.  DaVida beach club and restaurant is right down the hill and within walking distance.|Upon returned to the island of Anguilla I would definitely stay at CeBlue again
textTranslated: Kami berempat menginap di CeBlue Villas pada tanggal 10-17 April 2026. Vila-vilanya luar biasa! Kami masing-masing memiliki kamar pribadi dengan dek besar bersama yang memiliki pemandangan indah dan banyak tempat teduh, serta kolam renang pribadi. Kami memiliki area dapur bersama dengan meja makan yang dilengkapi dengan semua yang Anda butuhkan. Stafnya luar biasa dan semua orang sangat membantu. Kami memilih untuk memesan sarapan kontinental yang diantar setiap pagi, yang terdiri dari buah segar, jus jeruk, dan croissant atau bagel. Ini adalah cara yang sempurna untuk memulai hari. Shavonne mengatur transportasi untuk kami pada malam-malam kami pergi makan malam sehingga kami tidak perlu mengemudi. Kami mengikuti acara barbekyu sambutan pada malam pertama kami, yang benar-benar lezat. CeBlue berlokasi strategis di pulau ini dan hanya berjarak 15 menit berkendara ke Shoal Bay East ke satu arah atau 15 menit berkendara ke Meads Bay ke arah lain. Klub pantai dan restoran DaVida berada tepat di bawah bukit dan dapat dicapai dengan berjalan kaki. | Setelah kembali ke pulau Anguilla, saya pasti akan menginap di CeBlue lagi.

name: Christopher Stirgus
street: Frac. Mar Turquesa, SM 009 MZ 049 LT 008
text:
This villa was definitely one of the top places to stay on the island. We used their chef service every day and made sure we took care of their staff as well. Very clean and organized crew who coordinates the property!

My only (personal opinion) is please allow your customer to host a dinner or event at your property in the future. People who have the funds to afford this home, will easily take care of it and not destroy the home. It is important to keep max guests at 10ppl, but please consider allowing your costumer to host a private dinner in the backyard, since there is tons of seating and the views are so beautiful.
I forgot about the rules of no extra guests and hired a taco bar service. I gladly paid the fee and there were no damages done to the property. Maybe in the future, you will allow good customers do have a private dinner with family/friends, as long as its not a late party or so!

Thank you again E11even! WE LOVED IT HERE!
textTranslated:
Vila ini jelas merupakan salah satu tempat menginap terbaik di pulau ini. Kami menggunakan layanan koki mereka setiap hari dan memastikan kami juga merawat staf mereka dengan baik. Kru yang sangat bersih dan terorganisir yang mengoordinasikan properti!

Satu-satunya (pendapat pribadi) saya adalah, mohon izinkan pelanggan Anda untuk mengadakan makan malam atau acara di properti Anda di masa mendatang. Orang yang memiliki dana untuk membeli rumah ini akan dengan mudah mengurusnya dan tidak merusak rumah. Penting untuk membatasi tamu maksimal 10 orang, tetapi mohon pertimbangkan untuk mengizinkan pelanggan Anda mengadakan makan malam pribadi di halaman belakang, karena ada banyak tempat duduk dan pemandangannya sangat indah.
Saya lupa aturan tidak boleh ada tamu tambahan dan menyewa layanan bar taco. Saya dengan senang hati membayar biayanya dan tidak ada kerusakan yang terjadi pada properti. Mungkin di masa mendatang, Anda akan mengizinkan pelanggan yang baik untuk mengadakan makan malam pribadi bersama keluarga/teman, asalkan bukan pesta larut malam atau semacamnya!

Terima kasih sekali lagi, E11even! KAMI SENANG DI SINI!

text: Our group of 9  good friends returned to CeBlue for the second time and it was once again a fantastic vacation. The view  from our villa overlooking  the turquoise water was breathtaking at all times of the day ending with gorgeous sunsets.  We spent many hours  enjoying good conversation, cocktails and food in the spacious outdoor living area.  Crocus Bay Beach at the bottom of the hill  offers lounge chairs, umbrellas, great swimming, two restaurants, live music  and really good service.   Possibly the best thing about CeBlue is the friendly and helpful staff who go out of their way to answer questions and make arrangements of all kinds.  It's very likely we'll be going back to CeBlue for a third time next year.  It just keeps getting better!
textTranslated: Kelompok kami yang terdiri dari 9 teman baik kembali ke CeBlue untuk kedua kalinya dan sekali lagi liburan yang fantastis. Pemandangan dari vila kami yang menghadap ke perairan biru kehijauan sangat menakjubkan sepanjang hari, diakhiri dengan matahari terbenam yang indah. Kami menghabiskan banyak waktu menikmati percakapan yang menyenangkan, koktail, dan makanan di area ruang tamu luar ruangan yang luas. Pantai Crocus Bay di bawah bukit menawarkan kursi santai, payung, tempat berenang yang bagus, dua restoran, musik live, dan layanan yang sangat baik. Mungkin hal terbaik tentang CeBlue adalah staf yang ramah dan membantu yang selalu siap menjawab pertanyaan dan mengatur segala macam hal. Sangat mungkin kami akan kembali ke CeBlue untuk ketiga kalinya tahun depan. Tempat ini terus menjadi lebih baik!
title: CeBlue Villas & Beach Resort

name: HamptonLynchMob
text: All staff were competent, friendly, and very helpful. They offered information beyond just answering our questions. Maintenance staff arrived within minutes of a call.|The bedrooms and bathrooms are spacious and luxurious.  We like to cook, and the kitchen and grill were well-outfitted. |We spent most of our time on the deck, under the best-designed shade umbrellas you will ever see.|Two gripes:  we could not get TV service at the house to watch the Superbowl or the Olympics. And the pool has a too-rough surface on the shallow 3-tier area. name: conniez873
text: What a lovely time we had at Ce Blue! The villa was just wonderful- spacious, modern, well supplied, and an amazing deck overlooking beautiful waters- the views were so heavenly, we barely wanted to leave the deck! The staff was superb, especially Shevonne, the concierge, and anything we asked for was quickly realized or supplied. Would highly recommend this place for its quality, especially for the cost - we will definitely come back. One suggestion - we rented a car, which made it much easier to get around the island, and Shevonne made the experience of renting the car very easy! Definintely come to Ce Blue if you want a quiet, well-appointed getaway without the crowds and hassles of a typical upscale resort! Thank you, Ce Blue!
textTranslated: Betapa menyenangkan waktu yang kami habiskan di Ce Blue! Vila ini sungguh luar biasa - luas, modern, lengkap, dan memiliki dek menakjubkan yang menghadap ke perairan yang indah - pemandangannya sangat menakjubkan, kami hampir tidak ingin meninggalkan dek! Stafnya luar biasa, terutama Shevonne, petugas concierge, dan apa pun yang kami minta segera dipenuhi atau disediakan. Sangat merekomendasikan tempat ini karena kualitasnya, terutama dengan harga yang terjangkau - kami pasti akan kembali. Satu saran - kami menyewa mobil, yang membuat perjalanan keliling pulau jauh lebih mudah, dan Shevonne membuat pengalaman menyewa mobil sangat mudah! Pastikan untuk datang ke Ce Blue jika Anda menginginkan liburan yang tenang dan nyaman tanpa keramaian dan kerepotan resor mewah pada umumnya! Terima kasih, Ce Blue!
title: CeBlue Villas & Beach Resort

address: Valley Road, 1264 The Valley, Crocus Bay, Anguilla
name: Jacqueline Lesowitz
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for the wonderful review! We're delighted to hear you enjoyed your stay and felt the staff's attentive service and the beautiful surroundings. It’s great to know our team could make your experience effortless and enjoyable from early morning to late evening. We're proud of our  location and the vibrant island vibe that makes each visit special. Your kind words motivate us to continue providing memorable stays. We look forward to welcoming you back to CeBlue Luxury Villas soon—you’ll always have a home away from home with us. Until then, safe travels and best wishes for your next adventure!
text: Loved our time at CeBlue in February of 2026.  The property is exactly has described and depicted in the online pictures.  The staff is extremely hospitable and will instantly arrange any activity or meal you would want in a moments notice. There is a convenient group chat to correspond with them and they will reply as early  as 7am in the morning or as late as 9pm at night.  Essentially  they are around all day to answer your questions and help with plans.  The property sits overlooking the beach and you can either walk or drive down a short way to get to the beach. The island has a similar vibe, with staff at hotels and beaches ready and able to help and make you feel at home.  We loved our Anguilla vacation and hope to visit CeBlue again sometime soon.
textTranslated: Kami sangat menikmati waktu kami di CeBlue pada Februari 2026. Properti ini persis seperti yang dijelaskan dan digambarkan dalam gambar online. Stafnya sangat ramah dan akan segera mengatur aktivitas atau makanan apa pun yang Anda inginkan dalam waktu singkat. Terdapat grup obrolan yang nyaman untuk berkomunikasi dengan mereka dan mereka akan membalas paling cepat pukul 7 pagi atau paling lambat pukul 9 malam. Pada dasarnya mereka ada sepanjang hari untuk menjawab pertanyaan Anda dan membantu perencanaan. Properti ini menghadap ke pantai dan Anda dapat berjalan kaki atau berkendara sebentar untuk sampai ke pantai. Pulau ini memiliki suasana yang serupa, dengan staf di hotel dan pantai yang siap membantu dan membuat Anda merasa seperti di rumah. Kami sangat menyukai liburan kami di Anguilla dan berharap dapat mengunjungi CeBlue lagi dalam waktu dekat.
title: CeBlue Villas & Beach Resort

text: The CeBlue villas were magical! Everything was pristine! The view was gorgeous overlooking a beautiful beach. The service was absolutely impeccable, as was the food. title: CeBlue Villas & Beach Resort

name: C7394ZJlindseyh
text: CeBlue Villas Resort in Crocus Bay exceeded every expectation. The views from the deck were absolutely picturesque, and watching the sunset each evening felt like a postcard come to life. The staff was phenomenal, warm, personable, and genuinely invested in making our stay unforgettable.||Dining at the restaurant felt like a private, intimate experience, and the handcrafted cocktails were delightful. Victor’s piña coladas were truly exceptional. The resort’s location makes getting around Anguilla incredibly easy, and they even arranged a driving service for us, which was seamless and convenient.||What really sets CeBlue apart is their attention to detail. They helped arrange restaurant reservations, beach chairs at any beach we chose, and shared invaluable insight on must see spots across the island. Their local knowledge elevated our entire trip.||I would highly recommend CeBlue Villas Resort to anyone visiting Anguilla. It is the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and personalized service.
textTranslated: CeBlue Villas Resort di Crocus Bay melampaui semua harapan. Pemandangan dari dek benar-benar indah, dan menyaksikan matahari terbenam setiap malam terasa seperti kartu pos yang menjadi kenyataan. Stafnya luar biasa, ramah, menyenangkan, dan benar-benar berinvestasi untuk membuat kunjungan kami tak terlupakan. Bersantap di restoran terasa seperti pengalaman pribadi dan intim, dan koktail buatan tangan sangat lezat. Piña colada buatan Victor benar-benar luar biasa. Lokasi resor membuat berkeliling Anguilla sangat mudah, dan mereka bahkan mengatur layanan antar-jemput untuk kami, yang sangat mudah dan nyaman. Yang benar-benar membedakan CeBlue adalah perhatian mereka terhadap detail. Mereka membantu mengatur reservasi restoran, kursi pantai di pantai mana pun yang kami pilih, dan berbagi wawasan berharga tentang tempat-tempat yang wajib dikunjungi di seluruh pulau. Pengetahuan lokal mereka meningkatkan seluruh perjalanan kami. Saya sangat merekomendasikan CeBlue Villas Resort kepada siapa pun yang mengunjungi Anguilla. Ini adalah perpaduan sempurna antara kemewahan, kenyamanan, dan layanan yang dipersonalisasi.
title: CeBlue Villas & Beach Resort

responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your wonderful review. We are delighted to hear that your stay exceeded expectations and that you enjoyed the exquisite views, location, and our personalized service. Shevonne and the team are thrilled to have contributed to making your vacation memorable. It's fantastic to know you appreciated our efforts in arranging reservations and in-room massages. text: Anguilla is an amazing place but the Ceblue luxury villas made it one of our favorite vacations. title: CeBlue Villas & Beach Resort

address: Valley Road, 1264 The Valley, Crocus Bay, Anguilla
name: Jo Painter
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We're delighted to hear you felt at home and enjoyed our stunning location, private pool, and thoughtful amenities. It’s fantastic to know that our team made your stay memorable and that you appreciated the peaceful atmosphere, delicious dining options, and the beauty of Crocus Bay. Your kind words about the staff and service truly motivate us. We look forward to welcoming you and your friends back next year for another relaxing and unforgettable experience. Until then, take care and see you soon!
text:
From day one booking to Anything at all you want or need during our stay,  the entire staff are warm welcoming accommodating and genuinely super people who made us feel right at home.  We were treated like family and the place takes your breath away! The location is perfect. Watching sail boats catamarans and yachts in crocus bay and amazing sunsets all right off our deck with our own private pool was a real treat.  They thought of everything and made it available in each bedroom suite and in the media room and kitchen/dining area.  Washer and dryer included too!  The place is perfectly appointed. CeBlue restaurant is just a short walk down the hill and the food is Deliscious.  Don’t feel like walking?  They will bring dinner, it in our case breakfast, to you.   We relaxed with an amazing massage on our deck.  What an atmosphere.  We were to feel special in every interaction.   Our villa nestled in the hill overlooking crocus bay has 5 private bedrooms and baths all with a beautiful view.  The location is great with easy access to all the must see places in beautiful Anguilla including Shoal Bay, Sandy Grove, Rendezvous Bay, Meads Bay and more.  The snorkeling is great the friendship and hospitality impeccable
We are looking forward to coming back next year with friends.  Thanks for everything!
textTranslated:
Bahasa Indonesia: Dari hari pertama pemesanan hingga Apa pun yang Anda inginkan atau butuhkan selama kami menginap, seluruh stafnya hangat, ramah, akomodatif, dan benar-benar orang super yang membuat kami merasa seperti di rumah sendiri. Kami diperlakukan seperti keluarga dan tempat itu membuat Anda takjub! Lokasinya sempurna. Menyaksikan perahu layar, katamaran, dan kapal pesiar di teluk crocus dan matahari terbenam yang menakjubkan, semuanya langsung dari dek kami dengan kolam renang pribadi kami sendiri adalah suguhan yang nyata. Mereka memikirkan segalanya dan menyediakannya di setiap kamar tidur suite dan di ruang media dan dapur/ruang makan. Mesin cuci dan pengering juga disertakan! Tempatnya ditata dengan sempurna. Restoran CeBlue hanya berjalan kaki singkat menuruni bukit dan makanannya Lezat. Tidak ingin berjalan kaki? Mereka akan membawakan makan malam, dalam kasus kami sarapan, untuk Anda. Kami bersantai dengan pijat yang luar biasa di dek kami. Suasana yang luar biasa. Kami merasa istimewa dalam setiap interaksi. Vila kami yang terletak di bukit yang menghadap teluk crocus memiliki 5 kamar tidur dan kamar mandi pribadi, semuanya dengan pemandangan yang indah. Lokasinya sangat bagus dengan akses mudah ke semua tempat wajib dikunjungi di Anguilla yang indah, termasuk Shoal Bay, Sandy Grove, Rendezvous Bay, Meads Bay, dan banyak lagi. Snorkelingnya luar biasa, dan keramahan serta keramahannya luar biasa.
Kami tak sabar untuk kembali tahun depan bersama teman-teman. Terima kasih atas segalanya!
title: CeBlue Villas & Beach Resort

text:
Tempat glamping tenda yang cukup bagus. Tempatnya ada didalem kawasan tersendiri, jadi ga terlalu bising dari jalanan.. area.nya luas, bisa muat banyak orang. Secara harga masih oke untuk fasilitas dan kelengkapannya. Ada area parkir sendiri, bisa untuk mobil,  motor, ataupun bis. Dekat dengan jalan utama juga jadi kalo mau jajan keluar masih deket. Deket juga dengan masjid, persis dekat pintu masuk, jadi gampang kalo mau solat. Tenda lumayan besar bisa untuk 3 sampai 4 orang, sudah ada tenda matras, bantal dan selimut. Ada juga dispenser di beberapa titik. Toilet dan kamar mandi tersedia cukup banyak, ada water heater juga jadi tetap bisa mandi air hangat walopun suhu sedang dingin. Didalam juga ada kantin dan tempat untuk duduk santai bareng. Posisi persis di pinggir danau jadi punya view tersendiri.
Cuma kadang banyak rombongan lain yang menjadikan area ini sebagai tempat start untuk kumpul main ke arena rafting, jadi tempat untuk bilas penuh ngantri.. overall bagus, dan sangat rekomendasi

responseFromOwnerText:
Terima kasih pak @ajework atas ulasan dan saran nya. Semoga berkesan dan bisa menginap lagi ke villa soli deo gloria.
Untuk warga sekitar yg menunggu di gang, sebenarnya itu warga yg menolong keluar masuk nya mobil, tapi kalau kita sdh ada google map dan tdk nanya ke mereka, kita bisa terus jalan saja. Dan jalan yg sempit karena di kawal oleh mereka, jadi di arahkan ke jalan yg tercepat. Utk jalan yang dari atas(sebelah kanan) bisa utk masuk BUS besar. 
Terima kasih atas saran dan masukannya 🙏🙏
reviewContext/Sorotan hotel: Pemandangan yang indah, Tenang, Cocok untuk anak-anak, Harga terbaik
text:
Jujur, nginep di sini bener-bener ngasih pengalaman yang luar biasa dan cocok banget buat yang lagi cari tempat healing. Begitu sampai, capek di jalan langsung kebayar lunas sama suasananya yang tenang banget, ditambah pemandangannya yang super cantik dan manjain mata dari segala sudut. Nggak cuma menang di view, pelayanannya juga juara; stafnya ramah-ramah, cepet tanggap, dan bikin kita ngerasa welcome banget. Kamarnya juga nggak ada komplain sama sekali—super bersih, wangi, kasurnya nyaman, dan sirkulasi udaranya enak banget buat istirahat santai.
​Tapi, di balik semua kelebihan itu, ada satu hal yang lumayan jadi PR buat yang mau ke sini, yaitu akses jalannya. Buat bisa sampai ke lokasinya, kita harus ngelewatin rute yang cukup sempit, berkelok, dan turun-naiknya lumayan curam. Makanya, aku bener-bener nggak nyaranin rombongan ke sini pakai bus besar karena ruang geraknya pasti terbatas dan rawan banget. Mending pakai mobil pribadi yang kondisinya lagi prima aja. Selain itu, siapin mental dan uang tunai receh ya, soalnya pas belok dari jalan raya masuk ke jalan desa, ada aja beberapa warga lokal yang ngawal atau nunjukin jalan ke lokasi, yang ujung-ujungnya kita harus ngasih tip atau ada pungutan biaya ekstra. Walaupun bagian ini agak sedikit ngurangin kenyamanan di awal, tapi asalkan kendaraan aman dan udah prepare uang kecil, penginapan ini tetep worth it banget kok buat dicoba!

text: Harga kisaran 1jt, maksimal tamu 15 orang, didalamnya ada 2 kamar tidur, 1 ruang tengah yg luas, dapur, wc 2, dan ada ruang semi outdoor di belakang rumah tempat bakar² & ada kursi buat ngopi² juga. Ada tv, bisa nntn netflix, disney hotstar, dll dengan leluasa. Wc yg didalam kamar ada air hangatnya. Peralatan masak & makan juga lengkap. Mantap puol pokoknya. Tambah mantap kalo di kolam ada ikan yg buat terapi haha. Setelah subuh nyoba jalan² ke area luar villa dan suasananya enak banget, seger, asri & belum ada kemacetan lalulintas. Overall, sangat rekomendid.

address: 300B Chocolate Hole Rd Great, Cruz Bay, St John 00830, Kepulauan Virgin Amerika Serikat
name: Anthony Pirozzi
text:
For $800+ a night:

- The room was a bit worse for the wear
- Loud gas-powered golf carts EVERYWHERE. I don’t mean a couple to transport luggage, maybe some landscaping. Just random workers riding around solo criss-crossing the property constantly. When you’re walking somewhere on the grounds they fly by, cutting it close. You can’t walk anywhere without getting buzzed by numerous carts.
- Reception staff seemed nice, but many others act as if they hate their jobs. I can go anywhere for a lot less $ to be around people like that.
- Everything is stupid expensive. To a point I understand the premium…cost of bringing certain things to the island, but food/alcohol on the resort is gouging-level
- This is more of a St. John/USVI thing but it takes quite a bit to actually get there. Plane, shuttle, ferry, etc., and everyone along the way is wanting tips, tips, tips. It’s exhausting. The island itself is just ok. But with so many beautiful beaches and resorts in the US that are far cheaper (or cost as much but are ultra-premium) without the numerous hassles of getting there, USVI just doesn’t make sense to me.

First time/last time going to St. John, and probably won’t stay at a Westin again. Ritz in Naples is a FAR better option for the $.
textTranslated:
Dengan harga $800+ per malam:

- Kamarnya agak lusuh
- Kereta golf bertenaga gas berisik di mana-mana. Saya tidak bermaksud beberapa untuk mengangkut barang bawaan, mungkin beberapa untuk pekerjaan pertamanan. Hanya pekerja acak yang berkendara sendirian melintasi properti terus-menerus. Saat Anda berjalan di suatu tempat di halaman, mereka melaju kencang, sangat dekat. Anda tidak bisa berjalan ke mana pun tanpa didekati oleh banyak kereta golf.
- Staf resepsionis tampak ramah, tetapi banyak yang lain bertindak seolah-olah mereka membenci pekerjaan mereka. Saya bisa pergi ke mana saja dengan harga jauh lebih murah untuk berada di sekitar orang-orang seperti itu.
- Semuanya sangat mahal. Sampai batas tertentu saya mengerti biaya premium… biaya membawa barang-barang tertentu ke pulau, tetapi makanan/alkohol di resor sangat mahal.
- Ini lebih merupakan hal yang umum di St. John/USVI, tetapi butuh waktu cukup lama untuk benar-benar sampai ke sana. Pesawat, antar-jemput, feri, dll., dan semua orang di sepanjang jalan menginginkan tip, tip, tip. Itu melelahkan. Pulau itu sendiri biasa saja. Namun, dengan begitu banyak pantai dan resor indah di AS yang jauh lebih murah (atau harganya sama tetapi sangat mewah) tanpa banyak kerepotan untuk sampai ke sana, USVI (Kepulauan Virgin AS) sama sekali tidak masuk akal bagi saya.

Ini pertama kalinya/terakhir kalinya saya pergi ke St. John, dan mungkin tidak akan menginap di Westin lagi. Ritz di Naples adalah pilihan yang JAUH lebih baik untuk harga yang sama.

reviewContext/Detail penting: Terrible service. No ac
reviewContext/Kamar:
This was one of the worst hotel experiences I’ve had, especially for a brand like Marriott.

The air conditioning in our room did not work, and despite reporting it multiple times, nothing was properly done to fix it. What makes this completely unacceptable is that we had small children with us, and we were left in a hot, uncomfortable room with no real urgency or concern from staff.

There was no meaningful resolution, no adequate alternative offered, and no sense that anyone was taking the situation seriously. We were essentially left to deal with it on our own.

At a minimum, I expected proactive customer service, clear communication, and a willingness to make this right—none of which happened.

This is not the level of care or accountability you expect from Marriott. Management needs to take a hard look at how situations like this are handled, because this experience was unacceptable from start to finish.

reviewContext/Makanan & minuman: Mangos Deli was great to grab a breakfast sandwich or quick lunch. The groceries and beverages offered there were helpful when in a rush. They had a delicious curry chicken salad that we bought in the container frequently. We did walk to the Dolphin Market grocery store outside the resort which was easy to get to and stock up on groceries.
text: My family of four had the best week at this resort! We were having SO much fun that we added on two nights while we were there. Check-in process at the airport with the ferry ride was a nice feature to have, being that this was our first time visiting the island.  The property was beautiful, and the staff were super friendly. If a staff member drove by us on a golf cart while we were walking, they almost always asked us if we wanted a ride. Disc golf baskets and the fields they were in was a huge hit, and we used the one outside our room frequently. The open-air taxis that are located at the top of the stairs were always there, and we used them frequently. (We did not rent a car as I did not want to worry about driving.) When we weren't at the beach, we lounged by the pool. The daily pool activities, like BINGO, were so much fun! We did utilize the kids’ club one evening, and my boys loved it so much that they begged us to go back. When returning to St. John, we will 100 percent come back to the Westin. The convenience was everything!
textTranslated: Keluarga saya yang terdiri dari empat orang menghabiskan minggu terbaik di resor ini! Kami sangat senang sehingga kami menambah dua malam lagi selama di sana. Proses check-in di bandara dengan perjalanan feri adalah fitur yang bagus, mengingat ini adalah kunjungan pertama kami ke pulau ini. Propertinya indah, dan stafnya sangat ramah. Jika seorang anggota staf lewat di dekat kami dengan mobil golf saat kami berjalan, mereka hampir selalu bertanya apakah kami ingin tumpangan. Keranjang disc golf dan lapangan tempatnya berada sangat populer, dan kami sering menggunakannya di luar kamar kami. Taksi terbuka yang terletak di puncak tangga selalu ada, dan kami sering menggunakannya. (Kami tidak menyewa mobil karena saya tidak ingin repot mengemudi.) Ketika kami tidak berada di pantai, kami bersantai di tepi kolam renang. Aktivitas kolam renang harian, seperti BINGO, sangat menyenangkan! Kami juga menggunakan klub anak-anak suatu malam, dan anak-anak saya sangat menyukainya sehingga mereka memohon agar kami kembali. Saat kembali ke St. John, kami pasti akan kembali ke Westin. Kemudahan adalah segalanya!

text: Been coming to the Westin for many years and this year, it was as perfect as always. Room is so lovely and feels private despite having neighbors. They have the comfiest beds, all the kitchen necessities, and the housekeeping staff is so wonderful. Check in process is so easy and the rum punch welcome is my favorite tradition of all time. The shuttle service is great, quick, and the drivers are just the best. KJ, kay, Ken, jayshaun, and Hayden are the sweetest (and funniest). Taxi’s to and from are reliable and the drivers are the sweetest people on the planet. I can’t recommend this place enough ! Also highly recommend kayaking - there’s always a family of sea turtles in between the boats!

Proses check-in sangat mudah dan minuman rum punch sebagai sambutan adalah tradisi favorit saya sepanjang masa. Layanan antar-jemputnya bagus, cepat, dan para pengemudinya sangat ramah. KJ, Kay, Ken, Jayshaun, dan Hayden adalah orang-orang yang paling ramah (dan lucu). Taksi dari dan ke hotel dapat diandalkan dan para pengemudinya adalah orang-orang paling ramah di dunia. name: L T
text: This is a TIMESHARE, not a hotel.  I was confused by the conflicting reviews, while some people said it was nice, Others said the service was very lacking. I now understand because this is not a luxury hotel at all. If you go expecting hotel service, you will not find it.  If you think of it more as renting a condo that has some amenities then you will be pleased.  The rooms themselves are very nice and spacious, and the property is very pretty. There are activities such as Tennis and the pool, but they could use more considering the remote location, and the property did feel safe.  however, they do not have breakfast service every day At the restaurant, you are forced to walk to the local market and buy things you can cook in the room.  Taxis on the island are shared with as many people as they can fit, charged per person, think 15 person shuttle, so if you are a couple that could still be reasonable, but if you are a family, the costs become ridiculous to get to restaurants that are just ordinary. The beaches, however, are worth the trip.
textTranslated: Ini adalah TIMESHARE, bukan hotel. Saya bingung dengan ulasan yang saling bertentangan, sementara beberapa orang mengatakan tempatnya bagus, yang lain mengatakan layanannya sangat kurang. Sekarang saya mengerti karena ini sama sekali bukan hotel mewah. Jika Anda mengharapkan layanan hotel, Anda tidak akan menemukannya. Jika Anda menganggapnya lebih seperti menyewa kondominium yang memiliki beberapa fasilitas, maka Anda akan senang. Kamar-kamarnya sendiri sangat bagus dan luas, dan propertinya sangat indah. Ada aktivitas seperti tenis dan kolam renang, tetapi mereka bisa menambahkannya mengingat lokasinya yang terpencil, dan properti tersebut terasa aman. Namun, mereka tidak menyediakan layanan sarapan setiap hari. Di restoran, Anda terpaksa berjalan kaki ke pasar lokal dan membeli bahan-bahan yang bisa Anda masak di kamar. Taksi di pulau ini digunakan bersama dengan sebanyak mungkin orang yang muat, dengan biaya per orang, bayangkan antar-jemput 15 orang, jadi jika Anda pasangan, itu masih masuk akal, tetapi jika Anda keluarga, biayanya menjadi sangat mahal untuk pergi ke restoran biasa. Namun, pantainya sepadan dengan perjalanannya.

text:
There are no words to express my gratitude to Anne and the amazing staff at Casa Frisons. We (family of 12) recently stayed there (12/19-12/23). The best rental experience I have ever had, and I have had many! We hired a private Chef for dinner (Chef Juan) He and his wife were so professional and the food was amazing! I can't wait to book with Casa Frisons and Chef Juan again!
***Side notes: bring plenty of cash! It can get costly and ATM's are not always full with money. Also most food markets are separate, fruit and vegetables markets, fish market, and groceries store where you can find basics and meat along with alcohol. Lastly better to negotiate a driver in advance to get a good rate. We found a local driver but his car was too small for our large group however, he didn't mind making two trips to drive us down the hill to town since it was close by. You can rent a golf cart for about $60 a day for small errand and they will bring it tomorrow the property for you.
textTranslated:
Tak ada kata yang bisa mengungkapkan rasa terima kasih saya kepada Anne dan staf Casa Frisons yang luar biasa. Kami (keluarga beranggotakan 12 orang) baru-baru ini menginap di sana (19-23 Desember). Pengalaman sewa terbaik yang pernah saya alami, dan saya sudah sering mengalaminya! Kami menyewa Koki pribadi untuk makan malam (Chef Juan). Ia dan istrinya sangat profesional dan makanannya luar biasa! Saya tidak sabar untuk memesan lagi dengan Casa Frisons dan Chef Juan!
***Catatan tambahan: bawalah uang tunai yang banyak! Harganya bisa mahal dan ATM tidak selalu penuh. Selain itu, sebagian besar pasar makanan terpisah, ada pasar buah dan sayur, pasar ikan, dan toko kelontong di mana Anda bisa menemukan kebutuhan pokok dan daging serta alkohol. Terakhir, lebih baik bernegosiasi dengan sopir terlebih dahulu untuk mendapatkan harga yang bagus. Kami menemukan sopir lokal, tetapi mobilnya terlalu kecil untuk rombongan besar kami. Namun, ia tidak keberatan mengantar kami menuruni bukit ke kota karena lokasinya dekat. Anda dapat menyewa mobil golf seharga sekitar $60 sehari untuk keperluan kecil dan mereka akan membawanya besok ke properti untuk Anda.

for a golf cart to come
reviewContext/Kamar: The rooms are small and so far away from the pool and ma8n attractions
text:
Rating: 1/5 Stars
I am beyond frustrated with my stay here. To be clear, the only reason I am giving this even one star is for the views from the general property—because the room they actually gave me had no view of anything at all.
Room Issues & Second-Hand Smoke
Not only was our room poorly situated with no view, but we were also placed right next to people who were constantly smoking. The smell was unavoidable and made the stay even more uncomfortable. For the price we paid, being stuck in a viewless room with smoke drifting in is completely unacceptable.
Hostile and Unprofessional Service
The staff was not just unhelpful; they were actively hostile and rude. We encountered a total lack of hospitality at every turn. Simple requests were met with a bad attitude, and the service was consistently and frustratingly slow. When we tried to bring our concerns to their attention—including the room location and the smoke—they were completely unaccommodating. There were zero apologies; they were dismissive and defensive throughout our entire stay.
Unsanitary Room Conditions
The room itself was simply not clean. It was clear that housekeeping did not perform even a basic wipe-down before our arrival. We found:
• Smudges and grime all over high-touch areas like the door handles and furniture.
• Hairs left in the shower, which is a massive hygiene red flag and incredibly disgusting to find upon check-in.
• A general sense that the room was "clean and not clean" at the same time—while some areas looked fine, the most important surfaces were clearly neglected.
Conclusion
Between the dirty environment, the lack of a view, the smoke, and the hostile staff, this was an incredibly stressful stay. Do not be fooled by the photos of the views online; you might end up in a room like mine. I would strongly advise anyone looking for a stay in this area to book elsewhere.
textTranslated:
Rating: 1/5 Bintang
Saya sangat frustrasi dengan pengalaman menginap saya di sini. Jelasnya, satu-satunya alasan saya memberikan satu bintang pun adalah karena pemandangan dari properti secara umum—karena kamar yang sebenarnya mereka berikan kepada saya sama sekali tidak memiliki pemandangan apa pun.
Masalah Kamar & Asap Rokok Bekas
Kamar kami tidak hanya terletak di lokasi yang buruk tanpa pemandangan, tetapi kami juga ditempatkan tepat di sebelah orang-orang yang terus-menerus merokok. Baunya tidak dapat dihindari dan membuat pengalaman menginap semakin tidak nyaman. Dengan harga yang kami bayar, terjebak di kamar tanpa pemandangan dengan asap yang masuk sama sekali tidak dapat diterima.
Pelayanan yang Tidak Ramah dan Tidak Profesional
Staf tidak hanya tidak membantu; mereka secara aktif bersikap tidak ramah dan kasar. Kami mengalami kurangnya keramahan di setiap kesempatan. Permintaan sederhana ditanggapi dengan sikap buruk, dan pelayanannya selalu lambat dan membuat frustrasi. Ketika kami mencoba menyampaikan kekhawatiran kami kepada mereka—termasuk lokasi kamar dan asap—mereka sama sekali tidak membantu. Tidak ada permintaan maaf sama sekali; mereka bersikap acuh tak acuh dan defensif sepanjang masa menginap kami.

Kondisi Kamar yang Tidak Bersih
Kamar itu sendiri sama sekali tidak bersih. Jelas bahwa petugas kebersihan bahkan tidak melakukan pembersihan dasar sebelum kedatangan kami. Kami menemukan:
• Noda dan kotoran di seluruh area yang sering disentuh seperti gagang pintu dan furnitur.
• Rambut tertinggal di kamar mandi, yang merupakan tanda bahaya kebersihan yang sangat besar dan sangat menjijikkan untuk ditemukan saat check-in.
• Kesan umum bahwa kamar itu "bersih dan tidak bersih" pada saat yang sama—sementara beberapa area tampak baik-baik saja, permukaan yang paling penting jelas diabaikan.

Kesimpulan
Antara lingkungan yang kotor, kurangnya pemandangan, asap, dan staf yang tidak ramah, ini adalah pengalaman menginap yang sangat menegangkan. Jangan tertipu oleh foto-foto pemandangan online; Anda mungkin akan berakhir di kamar seperti milik saya. Saya sangat menyarankan siapa pun yang mencari tempat menginap di daerah ini untuk memesan di tempat lain.
